product_overview: ServisLog+ is an offline-first workshop management app that lets workshop staff securely sign in, register or join a bengkel (workshop), unlock local encrypted data, and manage service transactions and customers.
core_goals: Sign in and securely unlock the app for day-to-day workshop operations
Create and register a bengkel (workshop) for team use
Create, view, and track service transactions and customer/vehicle history
Protect local data with PIN/biometric access and AES-GCM encryption

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to sign in with email/password or biometric authentication to access the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> See main dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Choose biometric authentication -> Authenticate via Biometrics -> See main dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input with invalid format -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> See validation error for email format

features.name: Bengkel Registration (Onboarding)
features.description: Guide an authenticated user to create a new bengkel (workshop) by providing a name and setup PIN.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /onboarding -> Enter Bengkel name -> Provide Setup PIN -> Submit to create workshop -> See main dashboard for new bengkel

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /onboarding -> Leave Bengkel name empty -> Provide Setup PIN -> Submit to create workshop -> See validation error for missing Bengkel name

features.name: End-to-End Encryption Setup (Unlock)
features.description: Unlock the locally encrypted session (AES-256 GCM) using the setup PIN so the app can read/write protected local data.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /unlock -> Input PIN -> Submit PIN to unlock local session -> See main dashboard with decrypted local data

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /unlock -> Input incorrect PIN -> Submit PIN to unlock local session -> See validation error prompting PIN re-entry

features.name: Transaction Management (List & Create)
features.description: View service transactions and create new service transactions with customer, vehicle, services, and parts details.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /main -> Navigate to /transaction -> See list of service transactions

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /main -> Navigate to /transaction -> Start new transaction -> Enter customer and vehicle details -> Add services and parts -> Save transaction -> See new transaction in list

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Submit login form -> Navigate to /main -> Navigate to /transaction -> Start new transaction -> Leave required customer field empty -> Attempt to save transaction -> See validation error for missing customer information

routes.description: User authentication entry point via Email/Password or Biometric.
Initial setup to create or join a bengkel (workshop).
Secure screen to unlock local encrypted session.
Main dashboard and navigation wrapper for core features.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Secure login system using Firebase Auth and encrypted local storage.

features.name: End-to-End Encryption Setup
features.description: Setup and unlock AES-256 GCM encrypted databases.
